description_long: This handcart features a traditional Japanese-style design, with a rectangular wooden body adorned with ornate patterns and a curved, decorative roof. The sides are decorated with a grid of colored panels, primarily green and orange, and the cart is supported by two large spoked wheels. The front of the cart has two long wooden shafts for pulling, which are reinforced with metal bands. The roof is dark with gold dragon motifs, adding an elegant and historical touch. The rear and front ends are enclosed with wooden panels, and the overall construction suggests it is built for carrying goods or passengers in an urban or ceremonial context.
description: A traditional Japanese-style handcart with ornate woodwork, colored side panels, a curved roof with gold dragon motifs, and two large spoked wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, ornate side panels, and both wheels with the long pulling shafts extending to the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the curved roof with gold dragon motifs and the enclosed wooden front panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the colored side panels and wheels, with pulling shafts extending to the right.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back wooden panel, the curved roof, and the full length of the pulling shafts.
